Class GUI

java.lang.Object
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.GUI
public class GUI extends Object
Represents a base GUI within the GUI framework. Provides an addWidget(Widget) method to add widgets. Provides methods for enabling and disabling input events.
See Also:
  • Widget
  • Component
  • GUIManager

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addWidget(Widget widget)
    Adds the given widget to this GUI.
    void
    disableInput()
    Disables input events for every widget in this GUI.
    void
    disableInput(Widget exception)
    Disables input events for every widget in this GUI, with an exception.
    void
    enableInput()
    Enables input events for every widget in this GUI.
    List<Widget>
    getWidgets()
    Returns the list of widgets contained in this GUI.
    boolean
    isInputEnabled()
    Returns whether input events are enabled.
    void
    onCompilation()
    Override this method to provide logic that is run on the compilation of this GUI.
    void
    render(Graphics2D g)
    Forwards the render call to every widget contained in this GUI.
    void
    update()
    Forwards the update call to every widget contained in this GUI.

  • Constructor Details

    • GUI

      public GUI()

  • Method Details

    • addWidget

      public void addWidget(Widget widget)
      Adds the given widget to this GUI.
      Parameters:
      widget - the widget to be added
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - if this GUI has already been compiled
      NullPointerException - if the input widget is null

    • onCompilation

      public void onCompilation()
      Override this method to provide logic that is run on the compilation of this GUI.

    • render

      public void render(Graphics2D g)
      Forwards the render call to every widget contained in this GUI.
      Parameters:
      g - the graphics context to render on

    • update

      public void update()
      Forwards the update call to every widget contained in this GUI.

    • getWidgets

      public List<Widget> getWidgets()
      Returns the list of widgets contained in this GUI.
      Returns:
      the list of widgets contained in this GUI

    • isInputEnabled

      public boolean isInputEnabled()
      Returns whether input events are enabled.
      Returns:
      whether input events are enabled

    • enableInput

      public void enableInput()
      Enables input events for every widget in this GUI.

    • disableInput

      public void disableInput()
      Disables input events for every widget in this GUI.

    • disableInput

      public void disableInput(Widget exception)
      Disables input events for every widget in this GUI, with an exception.
      Parameters:
      exception - the widget that receives input events regardless
